title: Commodity Prices Drop on Concerns over Federal Reserve Stimulus Tapering
section_path: Commodity Prices Drop on Concerns over Federal Reserve Stimulus Tapering
section_path_text: Commodity Prices Drop on Concerns over Federal Reserve Stimulus Tapering
summary:
Main
By Ulf Bergman
The release of the US Federal Reserve's meeting minutes on Wednesday took much of the wind out of the sails for the global financial markets. There is a growing consensus among the decision-makers at the US central bank that its stimulus measures put in place to support the economy needs to be scaled back, as they expect the US economy to be able to sustain itself. This contributed to a sense of unease among investors worldwide at the same time as the strength of the continued recovery is being questioned, in light of the renewed spread of the virus.
